data.body: Delete settings-openrouter-section.tsx. Clean up: settings-sheet.tsx (remove OpenRouter section), settings-agents-section.tsx (remove OpenRouter panel/rows), settings-actions-section.tsx (remove OpenRouter virtual agent options), settings-pools-section.tsx (remove OpenRouter injection/pricing), settings-dispatch-section.tsx (remove openrouter prop), agent-info-bar.tsx (remove openrouter field), beats/page.tsx (remove kind:openrouter detection).
data.title: Remove OpenRouter from UI components
